content.rendered:
1. Terms

By accessing this Website, accessible from https://www.kalamacademy.org/, you are agreeing to be bound by these Website Terms and Conditions of Use and agree that you are responsible for the agreement with any applicable local laws. If you disagree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from accessing this site. The materials contained in this Website are protected by copyright and trademark law.

These terms and conditions are applicable to all of our products and services.

2. Use License

Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on Kalam Academy’s Website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:

  • modify or copy the materials;
  • use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display;
  • attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on Kalam Academy’s Website;
  • remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials; or
  • transferring the materials to another person or “mirror” the materials on any other server.

This will let Kalam Academy to terminate upon violations of any of these restrictions. Upon termination, your viewing right will also be terminated and you should destroy any downloaded materials in your possession whether it is printed or electronic format.

3. Disclaimer

All the materials on Kalam Academy’s Website are provided “as is”. Kalam Academy makes no warranties, may it be expressed or implied, therefore negates all other warranties. Furthermore, Kalam Academy does not make any representations concerning the accuracy or reliability of the use of the materials on its Website or otherwise relating to such materials or any sites linked to this Website.

4. Limitations

Kalam Academy or its suppliers will not be hold accountable for any damages that will arise with the use or inability to use the materials on Kalam Academy’s Website, even if Kalam Academy or an authorize representative of this Website has been notified, orally or written, of the possibility of such damage. Some jurisdiction does not allow limitations on implied warranties or limitations of liability for incidental damages, these limitations may not apply to you.

5. Revisions and Errata

The materials appearing on Kalam Academy’s Website may include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. Kalam Academy will not promise that any of the materials in this Website are accurate, complete, or current. Kalam Academy may change the materials contained on its Website at any time without notice. Kalam Academy does not make any commitment to update the materials.

6. Links

Kalam Academy has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its Website and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The presence of any link does not imply endorsement by Kalam Academy of the site. The use of any linked website is at the user’s own risk.

7. Site Terms of Use Modifications

Kalam Academy may revise these Terms of Use for its Website at any time without prior notice. By using this Website, you are agreeing to be bound by the current version of these Terms and Conditions of Use.

8. Your Privacy

Please read our Privacy Policy.

9. Governing Law

Any claim related to Kalam Academy’s Website shall be governed by the laws of in without regards to its conflict of law provisions.

10. Other

** At any point we can suspend our services for you or close a particular service if required. We will not be liable of any refund in that case.

*We are not liable for any data loss or system failure or any losses in such a situation.

**In any case you are not allowed to sell our product or white label our product or service without our permission. If found in any of the above activities we may file a lawsuit against you.

**We may refuse to provide you with our services if you do not follow our guidelines mentioned above.

***We may add our detail to your footer or website
